    1,25,07,31,22,30,46,39,0.15,16.50,33.0,21008.000,0.20,9.60,358.0,53,0.045,354,0.024,  7,0.026,  0,0.020,315,0.014,324,0.018,  0,0.013,337,0.011,311,0.016,315,0.004,315,0.021,284,0.026,272,0.016,248,0.025,279,0.024,253,0.019,264,0.013,299,0.013,279,0.013,207,0.018,158,0.023,178,0.029,162,0.019,137,0.013,122,0.026,143,0.034,127,0.032,120,0.040,120,0.037,112,0.046, 99,0.042, 95,0.049, 94,0.056, 92,0.061, 99,0.077, 84,0.076, 90,0.125,108,0.301,137,0.598,142,0.616,143,0.594,144,0.352,138,0.243,130,0.185,114,0.158,115,0.127,121,0.123,128,0.108,140,0.114,134,0.103,143,0.098,161,0.095,158,0.065,164
<FINISH>
